name: Land of Lightning Daimyo
description: He is the daimyō of the Land of Lightning.  During a meeting of the Five Great Shinobi Countries' daimyō, he agreed to the creation of the Allied Shinobi Forces. In the anime, he was requested to convene a Daimyō Summit by the Fourth Raikage.  Manga Debut: Chapter #488  Anime Debut: Naruto Shippūden Episode #217  (source: Narutopedia)
